name: python3-libvmdk
title: python3-libvmdk
summary: VMWare Virtual Disk format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
VMWare Virtual Disk format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvmdk is a library to access the VMware Virtual Disk (VMDK) format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvmdk.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libvmdk because VMWare Virtual Disk format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libvmdk as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libvmdk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libvmdk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
